hero.headline: Collaborate, Communicate, Complete
hero.subheadline: Specialized integrated Project Management consultancy and Engineering services. From FEED and design management to construction, commissioning, operations, and plant optimization.
hero.subheadlineAr: شركة ريلايبل متخصصة في استشارات إدارة المشاريع والهندسة — من FEED وإدارة التصميم إلى الإنشاءات والتشغيل التجريبي والعمليات والصيانة وتحسين المنشآت.

divisions.name: Project Management Consultancy
divisions.description: End-to-end project and program management from planning and scheduling through risk management, stakeholder coordination, and successful handover.

divisions.name: Engineering Services
divisions.description: Front-end engineering, detailed design management, procurement, commissioning, operations and optimization for industrial plants and utilities.

services.title: Front-End Engineering Design (FEED)
services.shortDescription: Define project scope and preliminary engineering to establish the foundation for successful industrial plant execution.

children.text: FEED (Front End Engineering Design) is a crucial phase in the lifecycle of industrial plants. It is where the project scope is defined and preliminary engineering is conducted to gather all necessary information for project execution.

Our FEED studies cover feasibility, process design, mechanical, electrical, civil and structural design, instrumentation and control, safety and environmental considerations, risk assessment, cost estimation, and documentation — ensuring projects meet technical, economic, and regulatory standards.

services.overviewDescription: By defining scope, technical basis, and preliminary design early, FEED provides the foundation for accurate budgeting, procurement, and execution of industrial plant projects.

benefits.title: Reduce Project Risk
benefits.description: Identify technical, commercial, and schedule risks before major capital commitments.

benefits.title: Accurate Cost & Schedule Basis
benefits.description: Establish reliable estimates and execution strategies for stakeholders and financiers.

benefits.title: Regulatory Alignment
benefits.description: Align designs with Saudi Building Code, environmental requirements, and client standards.

benefits.title: Execution Readiness
benefits.description: Deliver documentation packages that enable smooth transition to detailed design and construction.

processSteps: Define project objectives, scope boundaries, and design criteria.
Develop process flow diagrams, equipment lists, and layout concepts.
Perform multidisciplinary engineering and preliminary design.
Conduct HSE, environmental, and risk assessments.
Prepare cost estimates, schedules, and procurement strategies.
Deliver FEED report and basis for detailed engineering.

faqs.question: What is FEED in industrial projects?
faqs.answer: FEED (Front-End Engineering Design) is the phase where project scope, technical basis, and preliminary engineering are defined to support investment decisions and detailed design.

faqs.question: When should FEED be performed?
faqs.answer: FEED should be completed after concept selection and before detailed engineering, procurement, and construction to minimize costly changes later.

faqs.question: What deliverables does FEED include?
faqs.answer: Typical deliverables include process design basis, P&IDs, layouts, equipment specifications, cost estimates, schedules, and HSE documentation.

faqs.question: Why choose Reliable Company for FEED?
faqs.answer: We combine PMC and engineering expertise across desalination, oil & gas, water, and industrial sectors with proven on-time delivery.

keyBenefits.title: Multidisciplinary Teams
keyBenefits.description: Integrated process, mechanical, electrical, and civil coordination.

keyBenefits.title: Industrial Experience
keyBenefits.description: Desalination, oil & gas, and utilities sector expertise.

keyBenefits.title: Cost Certainty
keyBenefits.description: Reliable estimates that support investment decisions.

keyBenefits.title: Saudi Standards
keyBenefits.description: Compliance with local codes and regulatory requirements.

services.ctaDescription: Speak with our engineering team about defining scope and preliminary design for your next industrial project.

services.title: Project Management Consultancy
services.shortDescription: Streamline your project from start to finish with proven planning, scheduling, budgeting, and risk management methodologies.

children.text: Our Project Management Services are designed to streamline your project from start to finish. Our team provides end-to-end solutions including planning, scheduling, budgeting, and risk management.

Services include project planning and reporting, risk assessment and mitigation, scope and change management, stakeholder management, document management, cost estimation and budgeting, safety and quality management, quantity surveying, and contracts procurement management.

services.overviewDescription: Our PMC services provide end-to-end project governance — from planning and risk management through stakeholder coordination, document control, and commercial management.

benefits.title: On-Time Delivery
benefits.description: Structured controls that keep complex programs on schedule and within budget.

benefits.title: Risk Visibility
benefits.description: Proactive identification and mitigation of technical, commercial, and schedule risks.

benefits.title: Stakeholder Alignment
benefits.description: Clear communication and governance across owners, contractors, and regulators.

benefits.title: Commercial Control
benefits.description: Transparent cost tracking, change management, and contract administration.

processSteps: Establish project objectives, governance, and reporting framework.
Develop integrated schedules, budgets, and risk registers.
Monitor progress, quality, safety, and contractor performance.
Manage changes, claims, and stakeholder communications.
Coordinate procurement, submittals, and document control.
Support commissioning, handover, and project closeout.

faqs.question: What does PMC include?
faqs.answer: Project Management Consultancy covers planning, scheduling, budgeting, risk management, stakeholder coordination, document control, and commercial management throughout the project lifecycle.

faqs.question: Do you act as Owner's Engineer?
faqs.answer: Yes. We represent client interests, monitor contractor performance, and ensure deliverables meet technical and contractual requirements.

faqs.question: Which sectors do you support?
faqs.answer: We deliver PMC across desalination, oil & gas, water infrastructure, construction, and industrial utilities in Saudi Arabia.

faqs.question: Why choose Reliable for PMC?
faqs.answer: 100+ years combined team experience, 500+ projects delivered, and integrated engineering capabilities under one organization.

keyBenefits.title: Proven Track Record
keyBenefits.description: 500+ projects across the Kingdom and GCC.

keyBenefits.title: Integrated Delivery
keyBenefits.description: PMC aligned with engineering and commissioning teams.

keyBenefits.title: Transparent Reporting
keyBenefits.description: Clear dashboards for schedule, cost, and risk.

keyBenefits.title: Local Presence
keyBenefits.description: Jeddah-based team with Saudi market expertise.

services.ctaDescription: Partner with our PMC team for planning, control, and successful project delivery.

services.title: Detailed Engineering & Design Management
services.shortDescription: Integrate major and specialist design skills into one managed service with singular design team management.

children.text: Starting from the design phase, we bring together the major and specialist skills involved in project design into one managed service. The goals are ultimately managed interfaces and singular design team management.

Our design management services include requirements gathering, scope definition, consultant monitoring, design contract procurement, deliverable approval, time and cost control, permitting support, design progress meetings, regulatory compliance, constructability review, design workshops, and tender package management.

services.overviewDescription: We integrate major and specialist design disciplines into one managed service with singular team leadership and controlled interfaces.

benefits.title: Single Point of Accountability
benefits.description: One managed design team with clear interfaces and responsibilities.

benefits.title: Quality Assurance
benefits.description: Systematic review of consultant deliverables against scope and standards.

benefits.title: Schedule Control
benefits.description: Design progress meetings and milestone tracking to prevent delays.

benefits.title: Cost Efficiency
benefits.description: Optimized consultant procurement and change control.

processSteps: Define design requirements, scope, and standards.
Procure and onboard design consultants and specialists.
Monitor design progress, interfaces, and deliverables.
Conduct constructability and regulatory compliance reviews.
Approve drawings and specifications for construction.
Manage tender packages and support contractor selection.

faqs.question: What is design management?
faqs.answer: Design management coordinates multidisciplinary engineering teams, reviews deliverables, and ensures designs meet project requirements before construction.

faqs.question: Do you manage third-party consultants?
faqs.answer: Yes. We procure, monitor, and integrate specialist consultants under a unified management framework.

faqs.question: Which disciplines are covered?
faqs.answer: Process, mechanical, piping, electrical, instrumentation, civil, structural, and HSE coordination.

faqs.question: Why choose Reliable?
faqs.answer: We combine PMC governance with hands-on engineering experience across industrial sectors.

keyBenefits.title: Interface Control
keyBenefits.description: Managed coordination between all design disciplines.

services.title: Procurement Management
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive procurement solutions from sourcing and supplier selection through contract negotiation and delivery.

children.text: Streamline your procurement process and achieve greater efficiency with our comprehensive procurement management solutions. From sourcing to delivery, our expertise ensures optimal supplier performance and cost savings.

Services include procurement planning, sourcing suppliers, supplier selection, negotiating contracts, evaluating proposals, managing supplier performance, procurement execution and control, and contract management.

services.overviewDescription: Streamline sourcing, supplier selection, and contract negotiation with structured procurement planning and performance management.

benefits.title: Cost Savings
benefits.description: Competitive sourcing and negotiated contracts that optimize project spend.

benefits.title: Supplier Quality
benefits.description: Rigorous evaluation ensures capable and reliable vendors.

benefits.title: Schedule Assurance
benefits.description: Expediting and tracking to align deliveries with construction needs.

benefits.title: Risk Reduction
benefits.description: Clear contracts and performance monitoring minimize disputes.

processSteps: Develop procurement strategy and package breakdown.
Source and pre-qualify suppliers.
Issue RFQs/RFPs and evaluate technical-commercial proposals.
Negotiate and award contracts.
Monitor manufacturing, delivery, and supplier performance.
Manage variations, claims, and closeout documentation.

faqs.question: What types of packages do you procure?
faqs.answer: Equipment, materials, EPC contracts, specialist services, and long-lead items for industrial and infrastructure projects.

faqs.question: Do you support international suppliers?
faqs.answer: Yes. We manage global sourcing with logistics, customs, and compliance coordination.

faqs.question: How do you ensure supplier quality?
faqs.answer: Through technical evaluation, reference checks, factory inspections, and performance KPIs.

faqs.question: Why Reliable for procurement?
faqs.answer: Integrated PMC and engineering insight ensures procurement aligns with design and schedule requirements.

keyBenefits.title: End-to-End Coverage
keyBenefits.description: From strategy through contract closeout.

keyBenefits.title: Technical Evaluation

services.title: Program Management
services.shortDescription: Govern multiple linked projects with consistent standards, oversight, and optimized inter-dependencies.

children.text: Program Management oversees a group of individual projects linked through a shared organizational goal. The benefit is consistent governance and application of standards across multiple projects.

RELIABLE COMPANY helps achieve the best outcomes by managing projects' inter-dependencies, diverse stakeholders, and competing needs. Our services include pre and post strategic advice, procurement advice, program governance, project controls, client representation, and commercial and cost management.

services.overviewDescription: Govern multiple linked projects with consistent standards, optimized inter-dependencies, and unified stakeholder oversight.

benefits.title: Consistent Governance
benefits.description: Unified standards and processes across all projects in the program.

benefits.title: Optimized Dependencies
benefits.description: Manage shared resources, interfaces, and critical paths between projects.

benefits.title: Executive Visibility
benefits.description: Portfolio dashboards for decision-makers and investors.

benefits.title: Strategic Alignment
benefits.description: Ensure individual projects deliver broader organizational goals.

processSteps: Define program objectives, structure, and governance.
Establish common controls, reporting, and risk frameworks.
Coordinate schedules, budgets, and dependencies across projects.
Provide strategic advice on procurement and resourcing.
Monitor benefits realization and program performance.
Support transition to operations and program closeout.

faqs.question: What is the difference between project and program management?
faqs.answer: Project management focuses on a single deliverable; program management coordinates multiple related projects toward a shared strategic outcome.

faqs.question: When is program management needed?
faqs.answer: When multiple projects share resources, dependencies, or funding and require unified governance.

faqs.question: What industries do you serve?
faqs.answer: Water infrastructure, desalination, oil & gas, and large industrial development programs.

faqs.question: Why Reliable?
faqs.answer: We bring PMC depth plus engineering integration for complex multi-project portfolios.

keyBenefits.title: Portfolio View
keyBenefits.description: Holistic oversight across all linked projects.

keyBenefits.title: Risk Aggregation
keyBenefits.description: Identify and mitigate program-level risks early.

keyBenefits.title: Stakeholder Management
keyBenefits.description: Coordinate diverse investors, regulators, and contractors.

keyBenefits.title: Value Delivery
keyBenefits.description: Track benefits realization against strategic goals.

services.ctaDescription: Deliver complex multi-project portfolios with unified controls and strategic oversight.

services.title: Construction Management
services.shortDescription: End-to-end construction management from planning and scheduling to quality control and project handover.

children.text: Streamline your construction projects and optimize resources with our comprehensive construction management services. Our experienced team offers end-to-end solutions from planning and scheduling to budgeting and quality control.

We monitor contractors and project progress, manage time, cost and contracts, track procurement and submittals, manage documents, conduct progress meetings, assure safety and quality, and manage testing, commissioning, claims, and project closeout.

services.overviewDescription: End-to-end construction management from site mobilization through quality control, safety assurance, and project handover.

benefits.title: Site Control
benefits.description: Daily oversight of contractor performance and site activities.

benefits.title: Quality Assurance
benefits.description: Inspection and testing protocols that protect project integrity.

benefits.title: Safety Leadership
benefits.description: Proactive HSE management aligned with Saudi regulations.

benefits.title: Commercial Protection
benefits.description: Claims management and contract administration to protect client interests.

processSteps: Review construction plans, contracts, and mobilization readiness.
Monitor daily progress, quality, and safety on site.
Track procurement, submittals, and contractor deliverables.
Conduct progress meetings and issue structured reports.
Manage variations, claims, and schedule recovery.
Support testing, commissioning, and final handover.

faqs.question: What is construction management?
faqs.answer: Construction management provides owner-side oversight of contractors, ensuring work meets design, schedule, budget, safety, and quality requirements.

faqs.question: Do you manage EPC contractors?
faqs.answer: Yes. We monitor EPC and specialist contractors across industrial and infrastructure projects.

faqs.question: How do you handle delays?
faqs.answer: Through schedule analysis, recovery planning, and contractual claims management.

faqs.question: Why Reliable?
faqs.answer: Integrated engineering knowledge ensures construction oversight is technically informed and commercially sound.

keyBenefits.title: Owner Representation

keyBenefits.title: Closeout Excellence

services.ctaDescription: Ensure your construction phase is delivered safely, on time, and to specification.

services.title: Commissioning Management
services.shortDescription: Ensure all systems are installed, tested, and integrated before safe and efficient plant handover.

children.text: The commissioning management phase ensures all systems and components are installed, tested, and integrated properly before the plant is handed over for operation.

Our process covers pre-commissioning preparation, mechanical completion, system walkdowns, electrical and instrumentation verification, functional and integrated system testing, performance testing, operator training, documentation, handover to operations, and post-commissioning support.

services.overviewDescription: Ensure all systems are installed, tested, and integrated before safe and efficient handover to operations.

benefits.title: Operational Readiness
benefits.description: Plants ready for safe, efficient startup and sustained operations.

benefits.title: Defect Reduction
benefits.description: Systematic testing catches issues before handover.

benefits.title: Documentation Completeness
benefits.description: As-built records, O&M manuals, and training materials delivered.

benefits.title: Schedule Protection
benefits.description: Structured commissioning sequences prevent startup delays.

processSteps: Develop commissioning strategy and test procedures.
Complete mechanical completion and punch list clearance.
Perform electrical, instrumentation, and loop checks.
Execute functional and integrated system tests.
Conduct performance testing and optimization.
Train operators and hand over to operations with documentation.

faqs.question: What is commissioning management?
faqs.answer: Commissioning management oversees testing and verification of all plant systems before operational handover.

faqs.question: When does commissioning start?
faqs.answer: Planning begins during design; field activities start at mechanical completion and continue through startup.

faqs.question: Do you support desalination plants?
faqs.answer: Yes. We have extensive experience commissioning desalination and water treatment facilities.

faqs.question: Why Reliable?
faqs.answer: Our engineering and O&M teams understand both design intent and operational requirements.

keyBenefits.description: Structured procedures for every system and interface.

keyBenefits.title: Operator Focus
keyBenefits.description: Training and documentation for smooth transition.

keyBenefits.title: Post-Handover Support
keyBenefits.description: Continued assistance during initial operations.

services.ctaDescription: Ensure your plant is tested, verified, and ready for safe operational handover.

services.title: Operations & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Reliable operations and maintenance for desalination plants, water treatment facilities, and industrial utilities.

children.text: Operation and Maintenance of Desalination Plants, Water Treatment Plants, Industrial Facilities and General Utilities.

Through predictive analysis, proactive monitoring, and timely decision-making, we ensure safe, smooth, and uninterrupted plant performance with over 95% availability. Our structured maintenance approach minimizes downtime, extends equipment life, and reduces operating costs.

services.overviewDescription: Reliable operations and maintenance for desalination plants, water treatment facilities, and industrial utilities with 95%+ availability targets.

benefits.title: High Availability
benefits.description: Structured programs targeting 95%+ plant availability.

benefits.title: Cost Optimization
benefits.description: Predictive maintenance reduces downtime and extends equipment life.

benefits.title: Compliance Assurance

benefits.title: Expert Response
benefits.description: Rapid intervention when issues arise to minimize production loss.

processSteps: Assess plant condition and operational baseline.
Implement monitoring, reporting, and maintenance plans.
Execute daily operations with safety and quality controls.
Perform preventive and predictive maintenance activities.
Optimize energy, chemical usage, and production efficiency.
Report performance and recommend continuous improvements.

faqs.question: Which facilities do you operate?
faqs.answer: Desalination plants, water treatment facilities, industrial utilities, and general process plants.

faqs.question: What availability do you target?
faqs.answer: We design O&M programs to achieve over 95% availability through proactive monitoring and maintenance.

faqs.question: Do you provide emergency support?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our teams provide rapid expert intervention for unplanned outages and critical failures.

faqs.question: Why Reliable?
faqs.answer: Hands-on experience operating desalination and industrial plants across Saudi Arabia.

services.title: Industrial Plant Optimization
services.shortDescription: Continuous improvement of efficiency, productivity, reliability, and safety while reducing costs and environmental impact.

children.text: Optimization of industrial plants is a continuous process aimed at improving efficiency, productivity, reliability, and safety while reducing costs and environmental impact.

Our approach includes performance assessment, data collection and analysis, identification of improvement opportunities, process modeling and simulation, engineering design and analysis, implementation planning, testing and validation, performance monitoring, training, and iterative improvement cycles.

services.overviewDescription: Continuous improvement of efficiency, productivity, reliability, and safety while reducing costs and environmental impact.

benefits.title: Increased Efficiency
benefits.description: Identify and implement improvements that reduce energy and operating costs.

benefits.title: Higher Reliability
benefits.description: Address root causes of downtime and performance degradation.

benefits.title: Environmental Gains
benefits.description: Reduce emissions, waste, and resource consumption.

benefits.title: Sustained Results
benefits.description: Monitoring and iteration ensure long-term performance gains.

processSteps: Conduct performance assessment and data collection.
Analyze processes and identify improvement opportunities.
Develop engineering solutions and business cases.
Plan and implement optimization measures.
Test, validate, and measure results.
Monitor performance and iterate for continuous improvement.

faqs.question: What is plant optimization?
faqs.answer: Plant optimization is a continuous process to improve efficiency, reliability, safety, and cost performance of industrial facilities.

faqs.question: What tools do you use?
faqs.answer: Performance audits, data analytics, process simulation, and engineering design analysis.

faqs.question: Can optimization be done during operations?
faqs.answer: Yes. Most assessments and improvements are implemented without disrupting production.

faqs.question: Why Reliable?
faqs.answer: We combine O&M field experience with engineering analysis for practical, measurable improvements.

keyBenefits.title: Data-Driven
keyBenefits.description: Decisions backed by performance data and analysis.

keyBenefits.title: Practical Solutions
keyBenefits.description: Improvements that work in real operating environments.

keyBenefits.title: ROI Focus
keyBenefits.description: Business cases with clear return on investment.

keyBenefits.title: Continuous Support
keyBenefits.description: Ongoing monitoring and iterative improvement.

services.ctaDescription: Improve efficiency, reliability, and sustainability with structured optimization programs.

children.text: Reliable Company provides comprehensive operations and maintenance for desalination facilities, combining predictive analysis, proactive monitoring, and rapid expert intervention to optimize energy efficiency and water quality compliance.

children.text: Complete FEED study covering process design, mechanical and electrical systems, safety and environmental considerations, risk assessment, and cost estimation for a major oil and gas processing project.

children.text: End-to-end project management consultancy including planning, risk management, stakeholder coordination, and document control for a complex water infrastructure program delivered on time and within budget.

projects.title: Industrial Construction Management
projects.shortDescription: Construction management for a large-scale industrial manufacturing facility in the Eastern Province.

children.text: Full construction management services including contractor monitoring, progress tracking, quality and safety assurance, and commissioning support for an industrial complex.

projects.title: Plant Commissioning Management

children.text: Structured commissioning program covering system walkdowns, functional testing, integrated system testing, operator training, and handover to operations.

values.title: Quality & Service
values.description: Passion for quality and service in every deliverable — from concept through final handover.

values.title: Innovative Thinking
values.description: Innovative thinking and modern methodologies to solve complex industrial and infrastructure challenges.

values.title: Hands-on Experience
values.description: Hands-on experience across desalination, oil & gas, water infrastructure, FEED, and construction.

values.title: On-time Delivery
values.description: We deliver projects on-time within budget with full compliance. Time is money.

children.text: Reliable Company is a specialized, integrated Project Management consultancy and Engineering services group. As a group of companies, we started our operations in 2016 from UAE and in 2023 we expanded our business in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

Our management team has 100+ years of combined experience in managing 500+ projects in Desalination, Oil & Gas, Water Infrastructure networking, FEED, Construction and many more from concept till final handover. Passion for Quality & service, Innovative thinking and hands-on experience are the qualities of our team which makes them unique to deliver many challenging projects on-time within budget with compliance.

Our certified Project Managers and Engineers, Technical experts & skilled designers are committed to act as an owner's engineers/consultants, to optimize resources & equipments to deliver project On-time. Time is Money and we don't allow contractors to lose Seconds.
شركة ريلايبل متخصصة في استشارات إدارة المشاريع المتكاملة والهندسة. كمجموعة شركات، بدأنا عملياتنا في 2016 من الإمارات وفي 2023 وسّعنا أعمالنا في المملكة العربية السعودية.

يتمتع فريق الإدارة لدينا بأكثر من 100 سنة خبرة مجتمعة في إدارة أكثر من 500 مشروع في التحلية والنفط والغاز والبنية التحتية المائية وFEED والإنشاءات وغيرها من الفكرة حتى التسليم النهائي. الشغف بالجودة والخدمة، والتفكير الابتكاري، والخبرة العملية هي صفات فريقنا التي تميزه في تسليم المشاريع الصعبة في الوقت المحدد ضمن الميزانية وبامتثال كامل.

ملتزم مديرو المشاريع والمهندسون المعتمدون لدينا والخبراء الفنيون والمصممون الماهرون بالعمل كمهندسي/استشاريي المالك، لتحسين الموارد والمعدات وتسليم المشروع في الوقت المحدد. الوقت من ذهب ولا نسمح للمقاولين بإضاعة الثواني.
Reliable Company ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard personal information when you visit our website or contact us.
We may collect your name, email address, phone number, and project details when you submit our contact form. This information is used solely to respond to your inquiries and provide our services.
We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties except as required by law or to deliver services you have requested.
For questions about this policy, contact us at info@reliablecompany.sa.

By accessing and using the Reliable Company website, you agree to these Terms of Service. All content on this website is the property of Reliable Company and is protected by applicable copyright laws.
Information provided on this site is for general reference only and does not constitute professional advice. Specific project requirements should be discussed with our team.
We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of updated terms.

blogPosts.title: Integrated Engineering for Saudi Mega Projects
blogPosts.excerpt: How multidisciplinary teams deliver complex infrastructure across the Kingdom.
blogPosts.content:
Saudi Arabia continues to invest in transformative infrastructure — from NEOM and the Red Sea to metro systems and industrial cities.

Reliable Engineering brings civil, electrical, mechanical, and IT expertise under one roof to reduce coordination risk and accelerate delivery.

careers.title: Senior Civil Engineer
careers.description: Lead structural design for commercial and infrastructure projects.

careers.title: Electrical Design Engineer
careers.description: Design MV/LV distribution and low-current systems for industrial clients.

careers.title: HVAC Engineer
careers.description: Perform load calculations and HVAC design for commercial developments.
